## Summary

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Physics / verdict change (spec §8 non-negotiables apply)
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs / infra

## Verification
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (Vitest — pure physics)
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (incl. `verdict-invariant` rule)
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` passes (Playwright — smoke tests)
- [ ] `npm run build` produces a working bundle
- [ ] Manually tested in the browser
